mapper.update: MERGE INTO STOCKS t USING ( SELECT #{req.stockId} AS STOCK_ID, #{req.stockName} AS STOCK_NAME, #{req.stockSector} AS STOCK_SECTOR, #{req.stockInfo} AS STOCK_INFO, #{req.isActive} AS IS_ACTIVE FROM DUAL ) s ON (t.STOCK_ID = s.STOCK_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.STOCK_NAME = s.STOCK_NAME, t.STOCK_SECTOR = NVL(s.STOCK_SECTOR, t.STOCK_SECTOR), t.STOCK_INFO = s.STOCK_INFO, t.IS_ACTIVE = NVL(s.IS_ACTIVE, t.IS_ACTIVE) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (STOCK_ID, STOCK_NAME, STOCK_SECTOR, STOCK_INFO, IS_ACTIVE) VALUES (s.STOCK_ID, s.STOCK_NAME, s.STOCK_SECTOR, s.STOCK_INFO, NVL(s.IS_ACTIVE, 'Y'))
mapper.select: SELECT STOCK_ID AS stockId, STOCK_NAME AS stockName FROM STOCKS WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 'Y' AND ( UPPER(STOCK_NAME) LIKE UPPER(#{q}) || '%' OR STOCK_ID LIKE #{q} || '%' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(STOCK_NAME) LIKE UPPER(#{q}) || '%' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, STOCK_NAME FETCH FIRST #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT STOCK_ID AS stockId, STOCK_NAME AS stockName, STOCK_SECTOR AS stockSector, STOCK_INFO AS stockInfo, IS_ACTIVE AS isActive FROM STOCKS WHERE STOCK_ID = #{stockId}
